{{ isEditMode ? 'Edit Country' : 'Add Country' }}
Country Code
Created Date
Active
Country Name @if (countryForm.get('CountryName')?.invalid && countryForm.get('CountryName')?.touched) { Country Name is required }
Country Short Name @if (countryForm.get('CountryShortName')?.invalid && countryForm.get('CountryShortName')?.touched) { Short Name is required }
ISO Country Code @if (countryForm.get('CountryCode')?.invalid && countryForm.get('CountryCode')?.touched) { Country Code is required }
Currency Select currency @for (currency of filteredCurrencyList; track currency.CurrencyId) { {{ currency.CurrencyName }} } @if (countryForm.get('CurrencyId')?.invalid && countryForm.get('CurrencyId')?.touched) { Currency is required }
